Basic default .editorconfig file.description: Create a basic .editorconfig file with default values for all files

Basic default .editorconfig file for nod.description: Create a basic .editorconfig file with default values for node projects

Set indent_style.description: Sets the indentation style (tab or space).

Set indent_size.description: Sets the indentation size (in spaces or 'tab'). If `indent_size` equals to `tab`, the `indent_size` will be set to the tab size, which should be `tab_width` if `tab_width` is specified, or the tab size set by editor if `tab_width` is not specified.

Set tab_width.description: Sets the width of a single tabstop character (defaults `indent_size` when `indent_size` is a number).

Set end_of_line.description: Sets the line ending file format.

Set trim_trailing_whitespace.description: Denotes whether whitespace is removed from the end of lines.

Set insert_final_newline.description: Denotes whether file should end with a newline.

Set max_line_length.description: Forces hard line wrapping after the specified amount of characters.
